meta.title: A.I. MIDIs with chatGPT (The future of music production?)
meta.description:
ChatGPT and midis? No way!
Absolutely, watch me demonstrate how it's done!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com

chatGPT:
https://openai.com/blog/chatgpt

ableton live:
https://www.ableton.com/en/

A.I. MIDIS is all you need:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wmMa8AsIlZ8

colab notebook:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/i-midis-with-82852051

00:00 Intro
01:18 Asking chatGPT for a MIDI
03:24 Colab Notebooks
04:28 first super basic MIDI
04:44 More complex MIDI
05:33 Other format for prompting chatGPT for a MIDI
07:07 BachGPT
07:44 CanonGPT or PachelbelGPT
08:23 ChopinGPT
08:39 Outro
